controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your Customer Identification Procedure include risk-based systems and controls to verify that the government body exists?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you verify the existence of government bodies
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include adequate risk-based systems and controls to verify government body existence. Ensure your CDD process includes appropriate controls to determine the existence of all government body customers, as required under rule 4.8.2(1).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for all government body customers?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the government body
Full address of the government body's principal place of operations
Whether the government body is an entity or emanation, or is established under legislation, of the Commonwealth
Whether the government body is an entity or emanation, or is established under legislation, of a State, Territory, or a foreign country and the name of that State, Territory or country

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect all minimum required data for government body customers. Update your process to collect full name, principal place of operations address, Commonwealth status, and State/Territory/foreign country status (with jurisdictional name) for every government body customer before commencing a designated service, as required under rules 4.8.3(1), 4.8.3(2), 4.8.3(3), and 4.8.3(4).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information beyond the minimum should be collected for government bodies?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for additional KYC collection
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure lacks risk-based systems and controls for determining whether additional KYC information should be collected beyond the minimum requirements for government body customers. Implement a documented risk assessment process that evaluates whether the government body's risk profile warrants additional information collection, as required under rule 4.8.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the minimum KYC information collected for government bodies from reliable and independent documentation or electronic data?
controls.detail-label: Describe the verification methods and acceptable sources (documentation, electronic data, or both) you use for government body KYC
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Information procedure does not verify government body KYC information from reliable and independent sources. Update your process to verify all minimum KYC information (full name, principal place of operations, Commonwealth status, and State/Territory/foreign country status) from reliable and independent documentation, electronic data, or a combination of both, as required under rule 4.8.5.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether any additional KYC information collected should be verified?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for determining whether additional collected KYC should be verified
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure lacks risk-based systems and controls for determining whether additional KYC information should be verified for government body customers. Implement a documented risk assessment process that evaluates whether additional collected information warrants verification, as required under rule 4.8.6.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect information about the ownership or control of foreign government bodies?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for determining whether to collect beneficial ownership information for foreign government entities
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether beneficial ownership information should be collected for foreign government body customers. Implement a documented risk assessment process that evaluates whether the foreign government entity's profile requires collection of ownership or control information, as required under rule 4.8.7.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to verify beneficial ownership information collected for foreign government bodies?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for determining whether to verify beneficial ownership information for foreign government entities
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether beneficial ownership information for foreign government body customers should be verified. Implement a documented risk assessment process that evaluates whether collected ownership or control information requires verification from reliable and independent sources, as required under rule 4.8.8.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies when verifying government body information?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you respond to discrepancies in government body verification and how this helps you determine reasonableness of the information
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure lacks risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies identified when verifying government body information. Implement a documented process for resolving verification discrepancies that enables you to determine whether you can be reasonably satisfied about the government body's existence and beneficial ownership (where applicable), as required under rule 4.8.9.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to verify that government body customers exist and, where applicable, that beneficial ownership information is provided.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Procedures to collect minimum required KYC information for government body customers, including name, principal place of operations, and jurisdictional status.

groups.title: Verification of Information
groups.description: Procedures to verify collected KYC information from reliable and independent documentation or electronic data.

groups.title: Additional KYC Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based assessment to determine whether additional KYC information should be collected and verified beyond the minimum requirements.

groups.title: Foreign Government Entities — Beneficial Ownership
groups.description: Risk-based procedures to determine whether to collect and verify beneficial ownership information for foreign government body customers.

groups.title: Responding to Discrepancies
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies when verifying government body information and to determine reasonableness of the information provided.
